ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(TEXT(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.SBQQ__Type__c) = 'Amendment', TEXT(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.SBQQ__Status__c) = 'Draft', BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_Units'), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard', PRIORVALUE( NATT_Amendment_Update_Completed__c) <> false, OR(ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(CloseDate), ISCHANGED(NATT_Opportunity_Percentage__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Customer_Category__c), ISCHANGED(Description), ISCHANGED(LeadSource), TEXT(StageName) = 'Closing', TEXT(StageName) = 'Closed Won'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not update the opportunity of an amendment quote.
